title: euphorbia hirta var. ophthalmica
intro: Euphorbia hirta var. ophthalmica, also known as eye cactus or eye euphorbia, is a succulent plant native to tropical Africa and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conjunctivitis and other eye infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to promote eye health and treat conditions such as redness, itching, and discharge, making it a popular herbal remedy. Euphorbia hirta var. ophthalmica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments to utilize its health benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
